title: Gauss's Theorema Egregium

visual_sequence.observation: A bend from plane to cylinder preserves the metric and keeps K zero.
A rectangular grid bends without stretching lengths.
Stretching changes metric data; bending alone does not.
Curvature is computed from metric coefficients alone.
